subcodes.first_line: O Aqa Ghulam-'Ali, thou art the servant of the Abhá Beauty and the bondsman of His Holiness the Exalted One. Know thou, then, the measure of this bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آقا غلامعلی تو غلام جمال ابهائی و بنده حضرت اعلی قدر این فضل را بدان و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @growth of the Cause, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
